title: Antique Trading Ship
description: Adds ab antique villager trading ship to all ocean biomes
body:
Discover the Antique Trading Ship in this Mod!

This majestic vessel spawns in all of Minecraft's oceans, packed with treasures and mysterious loot.

![Trading ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cdf64488f4388bd58d8106ed046893252839a81.jpeg)


On board, you will also encounter villagers ready to trade with you.


![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e05097edff3d28ccde99fbe08df8bb9352c9f73.jpeg)



Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
